changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option; CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_id, o.id AS option_id, o.uid AS option_uid, o.option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, o.code AS option_code, o.name AS option_name, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), o.name)) AS option_name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), o.name)) AS option_name_ar, o.sort_order AS option_sort_order, os.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(os.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(os.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.option_value o LEFT JOIN public.option_set os ON os.id = o.option_set_id;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option;

changeSet.author: hamza

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_slm;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_uid_uniq;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_slm_uid;
